overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character navigating a dark, rainy cyberpunk alley at night, entering the 'Fingers MD' clinic, traversing a graffiti-covered hallway, and moving through a dimly lit back room where two people sit around a fire. The scene features neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and atmospheric haze typical of the game's visual style.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, rain-soaked cyberpunk alley at night. The camera moves forward past a vendor stall with an umbrella and orange barrels, while a bright pink neon sign reading 'Fingers MD' illuminates the left wall. A vendor in an orange jacket stands near the barrels as the player approaches.

events.description: opens the metal door and enters the building from the rainy alley

agents.ego_description: approaching the Fingers MD entrance, ascending the stairs, and opening the door to enter the building

notable_agents.action: person in red hooded jacket standing near the entrance stairs

entered.detail: dark building exterior with the entrance to the clinic
short concrete staircase leading up to the entrance door
heavy metal door with interaction prompt that opens to reveal the interior

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the Fingers MD building entrance, passing a person in a red hooded jacket standing near the stairs. The player ascends the concrete steps and opens the metal door at 22 seconds, transitioning from the rainy alley into the building's interior.

segments.scene_description: Inside the building, the camera moves through a narrow, dimly lit hallway with graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash on the floor. Fluorescent lights overhead provide sparse illumination as the player approaches a door at the far end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit back room with fire pit and squatters

events.description: enters the dark back room from the hallway, revealing a fire pit with people gathered around it

agents.ego_description: entering the dark room, observing the people by the fire, and moving toward the exit door on the far side

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near the fire pit
person standing near the fire pit facing the seated individual

entered.detail: small fire or candles providing the primary light source in the dark room

poster or paper attached to the right wall
metal door at the far end of the room leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The player enters a very dark back room illuminated only by a small fire pit where two people are gathered—one sitting on the left and one standing on the right. At 33 seconds, Johnny Silverhand comments 'Sounds like paradise.' The camera slowly moves past the fire toward an exit door on the far side, passing a window and wall poster in the dimly lit space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked neon alleyway into the claustrophobic, dimly lit depths of a clandestine clinic. It begins by moving through a narrow street past orange barrels and a vendor stall, guided by the glow of a bright pink Fingers MD neon sign. As the camera turns toward the building entrance, it passes a figure in a red hood and ascends concrete steps to transition from the rainy exterior through a metal door. The scene then shifts into a narrow, grime-streaked hallway where fluorescent lights flicker over graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash. Finally, the camera enters a dark back room illuminated only by the orange glow of a small fire pit where two people gather, moving slowly past them and a wall poster toward a distant exit door.
